title: Smoky Yam Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick stir fry dish made with smoky yams and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until translucent.
Add the sliced yams and cook for an additional 5-6 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Sprinkle smoked paprika over the yams and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the yams are tender and the onions are caramelized.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
